heading: Treatment of receipt of monetary allowance and other benefits
label: 1833 Treatment of receipt of monetary allowance and other benefits
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1833 was renumbered .section 3733 of this title
Amendments2003— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 108–183section 1823 of this title
amendments: Amendments2003— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 108–183section 1823 of this title

children.heading: .—Coordination With Other Benefits Paid to the Recipient
children.label: a .—Coordination With Other Benefits Paid to the Recipient
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, receipt by an individual of a monetary allowance under this chapter shall not impair, infringe, or otherwise affect the right of the individual to receive any other benefit to which the individual is otherwise entitled under any law administered by the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Coordination With Benefits Based on Relationship of Recipients
children.label: b .—Coordination With Benefits Based on Relationship of Recipients
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, receipt by an individual of a monetary allowance under this chapter shall not impair, infringe, or otherwise affect the right of any other individual to receive any benefit to which such other individual is entitled under any law administered by the Secretary based on the relationship of such other individual to the individual who receives such monetary allowance.

children.heading: .—Monetary Allowance Not To Be Considered as Income or Resources for Certain Purposes
children.label: c .—Monetary Allowance Not To Be Considered as Income or Resources for Certain Purposes
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, a monetary allowance paid an individual under this chapter shall not be considered as income or resources in determining eligibility for, or the amount of benefits under, any Federal or federally assisted program.
